points.title: Brief Garden by Bevis Bawa
points.description: Spectacular 2-hectare tropical garden masterpiece created by renowned landscape architect Bevis Bawa on a former rubber plantation, featuring over 200 plant species, artistic sculptures, and Italian-English landscape design influences.

points.title: Ventura Beach (Bentota Beach)
points.description: Pristine Blue Flag golden sand beach with crystal-clear turquoise waters, perfect for swimming, sunbathing, and tropical relaxation with excellent facilities and palm-fringed shoreline.

points.title: Madu Ganga River Safari
points.description: 150-acre mangrove ecosystem boat safari featuring 14 mangrove species, diverse wildlife including monitor lizards and water birds, Cinnamon Island visits, and traditional fishing community encounters.

points.title: Kosgoda Sea Turtle Conservation Project
points.description: Premier turtle hatchery 11km south protecting endangered species including Green, Hawksbill, and Olive Ridley turtles with educational programs, baby turtle releases, and rehabilitation facilities.

points.title: Bentota Water Sports Center
points.description: World-class water sports facility offering jet skiing, windsurfing, parasailing, wakeboarding, stand-up paddleboarding, banana boat rides, and professional instruction in ideal tropical conditions.

points.title: Handirangala Troll Rock
points.description: Mystical massive rock formation resembling a sleeping giant according to local legends, offering excellent hiking opportunities with panoramic views and unique geological wonder.

points.title: Galapatha Raja Maha Vihara Temple
points.description: Ancient Buddhist temple with centuries-old heritage featuring magnificent large Buddha statue, medieval stone inscriptions, traditional architecture, and peaceful meditation gardens.

points.title: Bentota Ayurveda Center
points.description: Premier wellness facility offering authentic Sri Lankan Ayurvedic treatments, herbal therapies, detox programs, therapeutic massages, and holistic healing in serene tropical settings.

points.title: Cinnamon Island Experience
points.description: Traditional cinnamon plantation visit accessible via Madu River boat safari, showcasing centuries-old spice cultivation methods, processing techniques, and cultural significance of Ceylon cinnamon.

points.title: Bentota River Lagoon
points.description: Scenic protected lagoon waters perfect for calm water sports, kayaking, fishing expeditions, mangrove exploration, and wildlife photography with diverse aquatic ecosystems.

points.title: Lunuganga Garden Estate
points.description: Geoffrey Bawa's country estate and garden showcasing landscape architecture masterpiece with stunning water features, sculpture gardens, and panoramic countryside views.

points.title: Bentota Fishermen's Stilt Fishing
points.description: Traditional stilt fishing demonstrations by local fishermen showcasing ancient techniques passed down through generations, offering authentic cultural experiences and photography opportunities.
